Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.MapVerifier

Packages that use MapVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of MapVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return MapVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static <K,​ V> MapVerifier<K,​V> DefaultRequirements.assertThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Same as DefaultRequirements.requireThat(Map, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    <K,​ V> MapVerifier<K,​V> Requirements.assertThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Same as Requirements.requireThat(Map, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    static <K,​ V> MapVerifier<K,​V> DefaultRequirements.requireThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Map.
    <K,​ V> MapVerifier<K,​V> Requirements.requireThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Map.

  • Uses of MapVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return MapVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    <K,​ V> MapVerifier<K,​V> JavaRequirements.assertThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Same as JavaRequirements.requireThat(Map, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    MapVerifier<K,​V> MapVerifier.entrySet​(Consumer<CollectionVerifier<Set<Map.Entry<K,​V>>,​Map.Entry<K,​V>>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    MapVerifier<K,​V> MapVerifier.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    MapVerifier<K,​V> MapVerifier.isNotEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty.
    MapVerifier<K,​V> MapVerifier.keySet​(Consumer<CollectionVerifier<Set<K>,​K>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    <K,​ V> MapVerifier<K,​V> JavaRequirements.requireThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a Map.
    MapVerifier<K,​V> MapVerifier.size​(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    MapVerifier<K,​V> MapVerifier.values​(Consumer<CollectionVerifier<Collection<V>,​V>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

  • Uses of MapVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement MapVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  MapVerifierImpl<K,​V>
    Default implementation of MapVerifier.
    class  MapVerifierNoOp<K,​V>
    A MapVerifier that does nothing.
